The gradle-wrapper.jar is not included in this repository (binary file).
To set it up, run ONE of these from the project root:

Option A – Android Studio:
  File > New > Import Project... 
  Android Studio will automatically download the wrapper.

Option B – Command line (requires Gradle installed):
  gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.7

Option C – Download manually:
  curl -L https://github.com/gradle/gradle/raw/v8.7.0/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar \
       -o gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar
